content: Pricing • Lemon Squeezy Payout fees sliced — another step towards a better Lemon Squeezy Read more Platform ECommerce Subscriptions Maximize your revenue with subscriptions Payments Payments and billing made easy-peasy Online Stores Your own online storefront in minutes Digital Products Sell digital products any way you want Checkout Overlays Add a native checkout flow anywhere Hosted Checkouts Increase conversions with hosted checkouts Features Affiliates Empower your superfans with affiliate tools Usage-based Billing new Track usage and bill based on consumption Customer Portal new A self-service customer portal for your store Discount Codes Coupons & discounts for a feel-good checkout Lead Magnets Distribute free products that build interest Pay What You Want Let customers choose the price they pay Reporting Merchant of Record Global sales tax & compliance handled for you Fraud Prevention Your always-on shield from financial fraud Customer Management Build enduring customer partnerships Changelog updates Freshly squeezed platform updates Roadmap Learn what features are on the horizon Resources Helpful links Help Center Need help or have a question? Help Docs Detailed help docs and knowledge base Developer Docs Browse our extensive developer docs Suggest a Feature Vote on new ideas or suggest your own Case studies All studies Canvas Supply achieved a 94% revenue boost with Lemon Squeezy Blog All articles 2026 Update: Lemon Squeezy + Stripe Managed Payments Pricing Wedges Help Sign in Get started Get started Whether you’re just starting out or selling like hotcakes, we’ve got your back Simple pricing with no hidden fees. It’s free to start — no trial, no contract, no risk. Get started for free “The setup was easy-peasy” “No more taxes to worry about” “Finally, an all-in-one solution” ecommerce 5% + 50¢ * There are no monthly charges for ecommerce features, and we only take a small cut of each sale so that you keep the majority of what you earn. Instantly accept payments globally Fully automated sales tax compliance A.I. fraud protection with payment risk intelligence Access to existing features + future releases each year * per transaction. Contact us for volume-based pricing * Some payments may be subject to additional fees View ecommerce features email marketing $0 / m Monthly or annual charges for email marketing features are based on the total number of subscribers you have and are free for up to 500 subscribers. 500 subscribers Annual discount Thank you! Your submission has been received! Oops! Something went wrong while submitting the form. View email marketing features 01 Accept online payments Don't worry about merchant accounts and billing logic. Choose per seat, usage-based and more . Customize as little or as much as you like. 02 Recurring billing + subscriptions Charge customers on a weekly, monthly, or yearly basis. Manage upgrades, downgrades, and cancels . Offer free trials, discounts, and more. 03 License key management Automatically issue license keys for your software and apps after each sale. Deactivate, re-issue, and have full control over license management. 04 Sell digital downloads Anyone can provide download links, but what about security and abuse? Your download links are securely signed , throttled, and more. 05 No-code checkout forms No matter what you use for your website, you can embed your checkout or share your unique checkout links and sell anywhere. 06 Launch your ecommerce store Build an ecommerce website in minutes without coding or design skills . Customizable, SSL secured and mobile-optimized as standard. 07 Discounts + coupon codes Generate unique coupon codes to reward your customers and nudge visitors closer to purchasing with one singular view to manage it all. 08 Create bundles + upsells Sell your products individually, or bundle them together in unique collections to earn more expansion revenue instantly. 09 Sales tax + VAT collection Lemon Squeezy is your merchant of record. We take on the liability of tax collection and calculation and pay taxes on your behalf. 10 Support major payment methods With Lemon Squeezy, you can accept up to 21 payment methods , including PayPal, all under one roof. We also shoulder the burden of VAT / taxes. 11 Grow with lead magnets Gain attention with freebies and “Pay what you want” donations, and turn subscribers into customers . Watch your email list grow overnight. 12 Recover lost payments More than just card retries. From abandoned carts to failed payment recovery, understand where your leaky buckets are and how to fix them. 13 Real-time revenue insights Have peace of mind monitoring your most valuable metrics relating to your business. From MRR, refunds, average order value, and more. 14 A.I. fraud protection Lemon Squeezy’s A.I. fraud system allows us to assess risk more accurately , reduce chargebacks, and accept more payments. 15 Add your custom domain On top of having control of your products, customers, subscriptions, and more, you can also add a custom domain to your store to make it yours. 01 Email marketing made easy Combining e-commerce and email marketing gives you context to finally send emails like you know your customers — because you do. 02 Avoid the spam folders Leverage Lemon Squeezy’s glowing reputation and increase your delivery rates to land more emails in more inboxes without the hassle. 03 Track email performance Frequently communicating with your audience is half the battle. Learn how your message is being received so you can course correct quickly. 04 Understand your audience By having your ecommerce and email data in one central location, you can connect with your audience in a whole new way. Context matters. 05 Automatic segmentation Intelligent segments automatically update depending on how customers interact with your products, packages, and lists — like magic. 06 Real-time customer profiles Gain a better understanding of your subscribers' behaviour , from purchase history, frequency, spending, lifetime value and more. OUR MOdel We’re all in this together — we win when you win At the core of Lemon Squeezy, our mission is to help people earn a living online . That means providing the best all-in-one platform for selling and marketing your digital products. Whether you're a small startup or an enormous enterprise, get all the features and benefits for exactly $0/mo. “It’s refreshing to see Lemon Squeezy focusing solely on digital products. Giving you all the necessary tools you’ll need to start selling your products and subscriptions quickly and easily.” Ian Barnard @ian_barnard “It’s so good to have a system focused on digital products, and it took me no time at all to allow customers to buy fonts straight from my website. There’s so much potential. I can’t wait to see what’s next!” TypeHeist typeheist.co “Lemon Squeezy is exactly what I have been looking for. The license key management and recurring payments have streamlined my business, and I am looking forward to seeing the platform grow.” UiPress uipress.co “I made my first $99/yr sale within the first hour of setup! Finally, an all-in-one solution for makers with multiple products, with the ability to sell with both subscription and one-off pricing. Incredible.” Rob Hope onepagelove.com “Lemon Squeezy has surpassed my expectations, and I’ve made the decision to move all my chips in on this platform for the long haul. The product is beautifully designed and a joy to use.” Michael Riddering Figma.Academy “When launching Iconic, Lemon Squeezy literally took care of everything. No need to think about taxes, VAT, license keys, etc. The setup really was easy-peasy.” James McDonald iconic.app "Lemon Squeezy made setting up a store and selling digital products super easy and fun. No more clunky plugins to manage or taxes to worry about. Lemon Squeezy does everything I need and more." Mike McAlister liftoffcourse.com "Lemon Squeezy had the perfect combination
